title: DFU - Case Update Needed popup is not present if Charge Case is on latest FW
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup incorrectly appears on Home Screen after earbud DFU when charge case is already on latest firmware
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and connect both earbuds.
2. Trigger a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds via the app.
3. Wait for the DFU to complete successfully.
5. Observe whether the "Case Update Needed" popup/card is displayed.
6. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Return to the Home screen again and observe whether the "Case Update Needed" popup/card is displayed.
expected: The "Case Update Needed" popup/card is not visible on the Home screen after the earbud DFU completes, and also not visible after restarting the app.
